name: sakura
description: Sakura plugin by Sanka that connects local AI clients to the hosted Sakura MCP server through a packaged proxy for live CRM, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents.

interface.shortDescription: Sakura, the Sanka AI employee — live Sanka data and private inbox
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's packaged local MCP proxy for live Sanka workflows from Codex. The proxy connects to hosted Sakura MCP, keeps Sanka tools attached before sign-in completes, and can upload exact user-provided local receipt paths as original expense attachment bytes. Start from the installed Sakura chip, the $sakura:sakura router, or a specific $sakura:... skill so Sanka owns CRM, estimates, approvals, quote readiness, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents such as deal-to-estimate and Salesforce Opportunity quote readiness. If a Sakura MCP response says the plugin is outdated, ask whether to refresh it; when the user says yes, refresh the local sanka-plugin repo, reload or reinstall Sakura, and start a fresh thread. Live Sanka operations must come from attached Sakura MCP tools, not local repo files, Django shell, Postgres, Salesforce MCP, or HubSpot MCP fallbacks.
defaultPrompt: Use $sakura:sakura to route a natural-language Sanka request
Use $sakura:create-expense to create an expense from a receipt
Use $sakura:list-deals to list recent deals in Sanka
